name: config-bootstrap
description: Lay down the per-machine MAST bootstrap config C:\WIS\unit.toml (machine identity + how to reach the config DB: site/project/controller_host/database/domain/location) and set the machine-wide MAST_PROJECT=unit environment variable. The TOML is the selected site profile (sites/<site>.toml), chosen at build time via build-mast.ps1 -Site; the file is per-site (identical across units at a site). Read by MAST_common load_local_config(); the app cross-checks it against the DB 'sites' doc and fails fast on mismatch. Runs early (order 150) so MAST_PROJECT and the file exist before the mast-unit service is installed.
